Notes: An UPDATE attempts to add an RR identical to an existing A RRset except for TTL. RFC 2136/2181 do not define whether the server should accept and normalize TTL, reject the update, or otherwise alter the RRset.

Steps.Description: Add a duplicate A RR for host1.campus.edu. with the same owner/type/class/RDATA as the existing RRset but a different TTL.

Steps.Name: host1.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe the post-update A RRset and its TTL handling.
